title: erigeron stanselliae
intro: Erigeron stanselliae, also known as Stansell's fleabane, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral effects. The plant has been used to treat various health conditions, such as sore throats, coughs, and digestive issues, due to its health benefits of reducing inflammation and promoting healing. Erigeron stanselliae can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, to support overall well-being and alleviate symptoms of certain health conditions.
